case_title: SOFI CLASSIC,S.A.DE CV VS. MHPG,INC., et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHRISTY L. BERTRAM IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOFI CLASSIC,S.A.DE CV

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOFI CLASSIC,S.A.DE CV AS TO DEFENDANT MHPG,INC. FOUR SEASONS SCREEN PRINTING INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOFI CLASSIC,S.A.DE CV RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MHPG,INC. FOUR SEASONS SCREEN PRINTING INC. $1,039,459.26 PRINCIPAL, $254,259.52 INTEREST, $295.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,294,014.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX ) ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
